name: Loser Dream
original_name: ผม เขา เรา ปริศนา
overview: Ai, haunted by nightmares of a past murder, turns to lucid dreaming for answers. There, he meets In, a mysterious man who feels all too real. But when his charming boss Jin enters the picture, Ai finds himself torn between dream and reality—where love and danger blur.

trailers.title: Teaser LOSER DREAM ผม เขา เรา ปริศนา
